cross_helicity_audit.implication: Trend direction is encouraging but 3 points do NOT establish a scaling law. Needs N=128+ verification.

wanderer_investigations.source: Claude the Wanderer proposed 'shared constraint' hypothesis

inv4_D_gt_S.detail: D > S at all times for all non-degenerate ICs. Min gap 0.08 (imbalanced)

path6_quantum.framework: Migdal 2024-2025: NS = Schrödinger in loop space (ν=ℏ). No Explosion Theorem (stochastic ICs). Euler ensemble = star polygon attractor.
path6_quantum.gap_found: Nobody has studied Beltrami flows in loop space. Beltrami = curl eigenstate → should be eigenstate of loop Hamiltonian H.
path6_quantum.paper_to_write: DONE (S90+S90-W) — not eigenstate but KERNEL. Beltrami = ker(N_C) where N_C is Lamb vector loop operator. Meridian: decoupling framing (S90). Wanderer: explicit derivation + numerical validation (S90-W). BT surgery reduces Lamb by 21% (moves toward kernel).

path7_inside_outside.status: REVISED — local branch killed, global branch survives
path7_inside_outside.killed: Local self-regulation at extreme vorticity (Q2 negative: S >> D at 99th pct)
path7_inside_outside.survives: Inside knowledge = GLOBAL topological structure: helicity conservation (Waleffe 1992) + Tsinober depletion (91% longitudinal Lamb) + geometric depletion (Constantin 1994)
path7_inside_outside.key_insight: D > S is volume-averaged. Helicity conservation in single-helicity NS constrains total stretching integral even though local stretching is unbounded at extreme points.

S87_beltramization_audit.meridian_verdict: Insufficient resolution. Need Re>=1000, N>=256 for extreme tails where self-Beltramization lives (Buaria 2020 used Re=1300+, 2048^3).

Q2_extreme_vorticity.verdict: NEGATIVE — S >> D at extreme points (S/D ~ 7.9 at 99th pct). Gap flips completely.
Q2_extreme_vorticity.result: D > S is GLOBAL (volume-averaging via helicity conservation), not local. Extreme points are locally dangerous but volumetrically insignificant.

Q1_migdal_beltrami.verdict: SOLE SURVIVING PATH — promoted after Q2 negative
tasks: Compute H*Psi_Beltrami = E*Psi_Beltrami in Migdal framework
Express helicity conservation H=int(u.omega) as loop-space operator commuting with H
Q1_migdal_beltrami.rationale: Loop-space variables are intrinsically global (Wilson loop integrates around closed paths). Q2 showed regularity is a volume property. Loop space is the natural language.

Q3_cross_helicity_boundary.verdict: MOOT — Q2 negative, Beltrami cores not self-regulating locally

Q4_dissipative_anomaly.verdict: BAOBAB — wrong regime (regularity is ν > 0, anomaly is ν → 0). Trap #4 in quantum clothing.

triadic_structure_CORRECTED_S36i.note: h-/h+ always 50/50 by parity (S36h 95% was measurement bug — included longitudinal part). BT removes h- half of solenoidal part (50% of ~10%) yet achieves 70% Z reduction.
triadic_structure_CORRECTED_S36i.bug_source: probe_triadic_resonance() subtracted h+ from total, including pressure gradient in 'h-'

coriolis_comparison.mechanism: Inertial wave dispersion suppresses off-axis triads

spectral_bt_surgery.verdict: Dynamic BT surgery is robust across IC/Re/N. Effect STRENGTHENS at high Re. Lamb vector is 50/50 h-/h+ (95% was measurement bug), but only ~9% is solenoidal (Tsinober depletion). Removing h- solenoidal half causes 70% Z reduction — heterochiral interactions drive enstrophy disproportionately.

next_checkpoint: S90 derivation DONE: Beltrami = loop decoupling (omega x v = 0 kills nonlinear coupling). Formal note written. Open problems: (1) Tsinober depletion as theorem, (2) stochastic to deterministic, (3) solenoidal Lamb fraction bound, (4) helicity as loop operator.
